gist.headline: Sweeping up the crypto dust
gist.blurb: We're doing some database spring cleaning and sweeping away the last remnants of the old crypto balance system. Just keeping the hive tidy!
gist.summary: Completes the removal of the deprecated crypto balance system by dropping the column from the database schema and sync scripts.
gist.impact: This is an internal database cleanup that streamlines our user schema and reduces technical debt.
gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) doing some spring cleaning or sweeping up old coins/data in a server room. Nomnom creature eating old database tables/coins.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny maid headband, sweeping up small pixelated gold coins into a dustpan. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old database printouts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
